title: User
description: A user identity, extending contact with authentication metadata.

name.description: The human-readable name of the user

id.description: User identifiers that uniquely identify this user across different systems

email.description: The user's email address as a unique identifier. If provided, this email must match the 'sub' field in the JWT token.

jwt.description: A JSON Web Token (JWT) asserting user identity and permissions. The JWT contains a header with cryptographic information and a payload with user claims. Header fields include: 'alg' (signature algorithm, e.g., 'EdDSA'), 'jku' (JSON Web Key Set URL for key verification), and 'kid' (key identifier). Payload fields include: 'iss' (issuer - the application issuing the token), 'aud' (audience - the intended recipient application), 'sub' (subject - the user identifier), 'exp' (expiration time as Unix timestamp), 'iat' (issued at time as Unix timestamp), and 'jti' (JWT ID - unique token identifier).
